Constant.Name: strInfirmary_Basic_Desc
Constant.Value: Improves Vitality. Increases the chance of Recovery from injuries and illness each day.

Constant.Name: strInfirmary_BasicB_Desc
Constant.Value: Improves Vitality. Increases the chance of Recovery from injuries and illness each day.

Constant.Name: strInfirmary_BasicC_Desc
Constant.Value: All the benefits of an Infirmary, plus the ability to create Stimulants. REQUIRES LIBRARY.

Constant.Name: strInfirmary_BonusBasic_Desc
Constant.Value: +10 Max Vitality for everyone. 15% Recovery Chance from injury/illness each day.

Constant.Name: strInfirmary_BonusAdv_Desc
Constant.Value: +10 Max Vitality for everyone. 30% Recovery Chance from injury/illness each day.

Constant.Name: strInfirmary_BonusC_Desc
Constant.Value: Allows manufacture of painkillers and stimulants.

Constant.Name: strInfirmary_BuiltIn_Fix_Desc
Constant.Value: There's a good infirmary here. Just need to stock it and clean up a little... Okay, a lot.

Constant.Name: strKitchen_Basic_Desc
Constant.Value: Having a clean area for food improves health and protects against illness. REQUIRES WORKSHOP.

Constant.Name: strKitchen_BonusStaff_Desc
Constant.Value: Allows the preparation of feasts. (Need someone who really knows how to cook, though.)

Constant.Name: strKitchen_Fixed_Desc
Constant.Value: Having a clean area for food improves health and protects against illness.

Constant.Name: strKitchen_BuiltIn_Fix_Desc
Constant.Value: There's a good kitchen here. Just need to clear out all the chaos and we can start using it.

Constant.Name: strKitchen_ActionTradeOp_Desc
Constant.Value: Give away 5 FOOD to help your neighbors survive.

Constant.Name: strWorkshop_Basic_Desc
Constant.Value: Having a dedicated work area would let us repair weapons, do light vehicle repairs, and make some useful items.

Constant.Name: strWorkshop_BasicB_Desc
Constant.Value: A full-fledged workshop would give us the ability to repair cars.

Constant.Name: strWorkshop_Car_Desc
Constant.Value: We could specialize this workshop to focus on construction and car repair. NEEDS TOOLS EXPERT.

Constant.Name: strWorkshop_Weapon_Desc
Constant.Value: A workshop focused on making explosives and incendiaries.

Constant.Name: strWorkshop_BonusBasic_Desc
Constant.Value: Automatically repair stored weapons each day ... or do it manually at the Supply Locker for 30 Influence.

Constant.Name: strWorkshop_BonusAdv_Desc
Constant.Value: Automatically repair body and tire damage for vehicles parked overnight.

Constant.Name: strWorkshop_BonusCar_Desc
Constant.Value: Automatically repair body, engine, and tire damage. Replace lost bumpers and doors.

Constant.Name: strWorkshop_BonusWeapon_Desc
Constant.Value: Allows the creation of explosives, in addition to basic vehicle repairs.

Constant.Name: strWorkshop_BonusChem_Desc
Constant.Value: Prevents explosives mishaps. REQUIRES CHEMISTRY EXPERT.

Constant.Name: strWorkshop_Fixed_Desc
Constant.Value: Having a clean area for food improves health and protects against illness.

Constant.Name: strBedroom_Basic_Desc
Constant.Value: The more people we have, the more beds we need. This'll give us a few more places to sleep.

Constant.Name: strBedroom_BasicWeak_Desc
Constant.Value: A Sleeping Area helps combat Sleep Deprivation. Can be upgraded to a Bunkhouse with actual Beds.

Constant.Name: strBedroom_BonusConfidence_Desc
Constant.Value: Increases everyone's stamina by 10. (MUST HAVE A BED FOR EVERYONE.)

Constant.Name: strBedroom_BonusWeak_Desc
Constant.Value: Provides no beds, but gives a 50% chance of preventing Sleep Deprivation.

Constant.Name: strBedroom_Fixed_Desc
Constant.Value: Provides +8 beds to sleep in. If we have enough beds for everyone, people might even feel rested.

Constant.Name: strBedroom_BuiltIn_Fix_Desc
Constant.Value: This would give us more spots for sleeping. Just need to clear out the remnants of... what happened here.

Constant.Name: strStorage_Basic_Desc
Constant.Value: Increases our storage capacity for all the key survival resources (Food, Medicine, Building Materials, Ammunition, and Fuel.) REQUIRES WORKSHOP.

Constant.Name: strStorage_Food_Desc
Constant.Value: Setting things up for safe food storage allows us to attempt sanitary food storage.

Constant.Name: strStorage_Refrigeration_Desc
Constant.Value: With a refrigerated storage area, we can really improve our ability to keep food fresh.

Constant.Name: strStorage_BonusBasic_Desc
Constant.Value: +20 Food, Ammo, Medicine, Fuel, and Materials capacity.

Constant.Name: strStorage_BonusBasic2_Desc
Constant.Value: +30 Food, Ammo, Medicine, Fuel, and Materials capacity.

Constant.Name: strStorage_BonusBasic3_Desc
Constant.Value: +40 Food, Ammo, Medicine, Fuel, and Materials capacity.

Constant.Name: strStorage_BonusBasicGeneric_Desc
Constant.Value: Additional Food, Ammo, Medicine, Fuel, and Materials capacity.

Constant.Name: strStorage_Upgrade_Desc
Constant.Value: +10 Food, Ammo, Medicine, Fuel, and Materials capacity.

Constant.Name: strStorage_BonusRefrigeration_Desc
Constant.Value: Dramatically reduces food spoilage and food poisoning.

Constant.Name: strStorage_ActionTradeOpBD_Desc
Constant.Value: Gain +3 AMMO for creating biodiesel fuel for another group of survivors.

Constant.Name: strStorage_ActionTradeOpFP_Desc
Constant.Value: Gain +5 FOOD in exchange for pickling and curing food for another survivor group.

Constant.Name: strStorage_BuiltIn_Fix_Desc
Constant.Value: There's a good storage space here. Just need to clear out all the chaos and we can start using it.

Constant.Name: strLibrary_Basic_Desc
Constant.Value: We could start gathering books and put together a reference area.

Constant.Name: strLibrary_BonusBasic_Desc
Constant.Value: By sharing knowledge, we all improve our Wits faster.

Constant.Name: strLibrary_ActionTradeOp_Desc
Constant.Value: Gain +2 AMMO for providing library access to another group of survivors.

Constant.Name: strLibrary_BuiltIn_Fix_Desc
Constant.Value: There's a good library here. Just need to clear out all the chaos and we can start using it.

Constant.Name: strLibrary_ActionWits_Desc
Constant.Value: Compile the latest survival tips from everyone. REQUIRES RESEARCH EXPERT.

Constant.Name: strWatchtower_Basic_Desc
Constant.Value: Something to protect our perimeter. Having a watchtower increases the safe area around our home.

Constant.Name: strWatchtower_BonusStaff_Desc
Constant.Value: Having someone up here should help keep the zeds at bay.

Constant.Name: strWatchtower_BonusSnipe_Desc
Constant.Value: We've been actively sniping zombies, giving us a larger safe area around our home.

Constant.Name: strWatchtower_ActionTradeOp_Desc
Constant.Value: Gain +3 AMMO to train survivors from another community with firearms.

Constant.Name: strTraining_Basic_Desc
Constant.Value: A training area improves physical fitness and gives us a place to hone combat skills.

Constant.Name: strTraining_BasicB_Desc
Constant.Value: A dojo provides the right space to practice specific survival techniques.

Constant.Name: strTraining_BonusStaff_Desc
Constant.Value: Prevents injuries. Allows establishment of a Fitness Regimen.

Constant.Name: strTraining_BonusFitness_Desc
Constant.Value: Organized exercise program: An additional +10 Stamina for everyone.

Constant.Name: strTraining_ActionFitness_Desc
Constant.Value: An additional +10 Stamina for everyone. REQUIRES FITNESS EXPERT.

Constant.Name: strTraining_ActionTradeOp_Desc
Constant.Value: Gain +3 AMMO to train survivors from another community in self-defense.

Constant.Name: strGenerator_VariantBasic_Desc
Constant.Value: Uses up Fuel to provide electricity to your home. (Some facilities need electricity to work.) REQUIRES WORKSHOP.

Constant.Name: strGenerator_VariantBasic4_Desc
Constant.Value: With a more efficient set-up, we get more electricity from the same amount of fuel. REQUIRES WORKSHOP.

Constant.Name: strGenerator_BonusBasic_Desc
Constant.Value: +10 Electricity. Uses fuel to provide electricity.

Constant.Name: strDiningArea_VariantBasic_Desc
Constant.Value: Eating together can help reduce discord in the community and maintain cleanliness.

Constant.Name: strGarden_AdvancedDesc
Constant.Value: A greenhouse provides higher yield crops than a garden.

Constant.Name: strGarden_VariantSimple1_Desc
Constant.Value: A place to grow fresh food. Just getting started.

Constant.Name: strGarden_VariantSimple2_Desc
Constant.Value: A place to grow fresh food. Coming along nicely.

Constant.Name: strGarden_VariantSimple3_Desc
Constant.Value: A place to grow fresh food. A thriving crop!

Constant.Name: strGarden_ResearchGreenhouse_Desc
Constant.Value: A greenhouse will improve our crop yields.

Constant.Name: strGarden_ResearchBiodiesel_Desc
Constant.Value: We can convert some of our food into fuel.

Constant.Name: strResearch_Grenade_PipeBomb_Desc
Constant.Value: Unlocks the ability to create Pipe Bombs. REQUIRES A MUNITIONS SHOP.

Constant.Name: strResearch_Molotov_HomeMade_Strong_Desc
Constant.Value: Unlocks the ability to create Chemical Incendiaries. REQUIRES A MUNITIONS SHOP and MEDICAL LAB.

Constant.Name: strResearch_Stimulants_HomeMade_Strong_Desc
Constant.Value: Would allow us to create more effective stimulants (Uses up medical supplies.) REQUIRES MEDICAL LAB.

Constant.Name: strResearch_Grenade_PipeBomb_Strong_Desc
Constant.Value: Unlocks the ability to create Steel Pipe Bombs. REQUIRES A MUNITIONS SHOP.

Constant.Name: strOutpost_BonusStaff_Desc
Constant.Value: Responsible for periodically stopping by and checking on the site.

Constant.Name: strOutpost_BonusLocker_Desc
Constant.Value: A place to resupply without traveling all the way home.

Constant.Name: strOutpost_BonusRescue_Desc
Constant.Value: 15% chance of missing allies coming home safely on their own.

Constant.Name: strOutpost_ActionDefend_Desc
Constant.Value: Increase protected range around the outpost.

Constant.Name: strPerimeterDefense_RestockMines_Desc
Constant.Value: Lay IFF mines that will blow up the zombies, but deactivate in the presence of friendlies.

Constant.Name: strPerimeterDefense_RestockPropane_Desc
Constant.Value: Place propane tanks just outside the gates for one-shot zombie dispersal.

Constant.Name: strPerimeterDefense_RestockFireworks_Desc
Constant.Value: Arrange fireworks outside the perimeter as a potential distraction.

Constant.Name: strEvent_ta10Buddies_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Made it to the ranger station, but it looks like we're not out of the woods yet. Heh. Ed will be sad he missed making that pun. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ta15Go_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Where the hell did these nutjobs come from? And why are they so... bitey? - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ta20Gunshots_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Well, I'm sure as hell not gonna object to having a trained soldier on our side. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ta20Forest_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Found some stuff that might be useful, but nobody else alive. This is so fucked up. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ta20Lakeside_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Jesus. This is like walking through a war zone. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ta20Tower_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: This kind of surveying could be useful - I'll have to mark likely spots on my map. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ta30Return_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Holy shit! We were only gone a few minutes, what the hell happened? - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar01Request_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Maybe they can get us out of here. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar01Request_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: If the Army isn't here to get us out, what the hell are they doing here? -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar02Quarantine_Stall_Description
Constant.Value: Haven't seen any other Army choppers land near us, but we'll keep an eye out. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar02Quarantine_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sounds like the Army is stepping things up.... -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar02Quarantine_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Close call for those two, looks like the Army isn't here to protect and serve. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar02Quarantine_Aftermath_Summary
Constant.Value: The Army may have use for you.

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar02Quarantine_Aftermath_Description
Constant.Value: You're a bunch of law-breaking delinquents, but you're tough. I might have a use for you. I'll be in touch. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar02Quarantine_Aftermath_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Watch for EYES IN THE SKY missions for the Army.

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar03Mayday_Stall_Description
Constant.Value: The Army's been pretty quiet since that last incident. Let's hope it stays that way. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar03Mayday_Stall_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Let's not get too comfortable. They may be back tomorrow. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar03Mayday_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sounds like the Army's "non-interference" policy is coming from higher up. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar04Bridges_Stall_Description
Constant.Value: Still plenty of radio chatter, but there've been no new sightings of the Army near us. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar04Bridges_Stall_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Seems like they're done causing trouble for the day. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar04Bridges_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sounds like Sgt. Tan's having trouble with his superiors. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar04Bridges_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Well, we're not stuck on this side of the river any more. Wonder what's happening over there. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar04Fairgrounds_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Okay, this is starting to get seriously creepy. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar05Water_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sgt. Tan found something, he wants to meet and it doesn't sound good. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar05Water_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Well, now we know where the black fever came from. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar06Obstacles_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Only one way out and it's walled off. Options are limited, get through it or die. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar06Obstacles_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: The military has a term for this...FUBAR. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar06Explosives_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: We're going to need some pretty hefty firepower to blow this barricade. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar06Explosives_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Oh, military-grade explosives. Is there any problem you can't solve?

Constant.Name: strEvent_ar07Finale_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: All that's left is to blow this barricade and get out of here. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_arR1Spotter_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sgt. Tan wants someone to call out horde locations for his artillery buddies. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_arR1Spotter_Discovered_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Start by climbing the designated Survey location.

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch01Home_Discovered_Name
Constant.Value: MISSION: The Voice On the Radio

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch01Home_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: I'm not sure how much I trust these people, but at least they're not trying to kill us on sight. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch01Home_Completed_Name
Constant.Value: COMPLETED: The Voice On the Radio

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch01Home_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Well, looks like we're not evicted, yet. Keeping an eye on Alan though. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch02Tour_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Lily wants to show me around the church. I guess that's a good move. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch02Tour_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Gotta say, it seems like these people have a pretty good setup here. Maybe we should stick around. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch03Survey_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Lily wants me to go climb a cell tower in town and see if I can see any place to find medicine. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch03Survey_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Spotted a vet clinic that looks fairly untouched. We're going to go see what we can find. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch03Meds_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sam and Alan are waiting at the clinic. I'll put up with Alan if it means getting the meds. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch03Meds_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Note to self: punch Alan right in his goddamn face. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch04Brother_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Lily's brother is in trouble. Maybe if I bail him out it'll earn us some points. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch04Brother_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: I got Lily's brother home safe. Hopefully his boyfriend made it too. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch04Brother_Aborted_Summary
Constant.Value: Jacob was left to his fate.

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch04Brother_Aborted_Description
Constant.Value: I saw that Lily's brother was in trouble, but couldn't help. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch04Brother_Stall_Summary
Constant.Value: No signs of Doc Hanson today.

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch04Brother_Stall_Description
Constant.Value: I've been asking around, but no signs of Doc Hanson yet. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch04Brother_Stall_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Try to understand, we might not find him until tomorrow. - Lily

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch05Sites_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Things are getting pretty crowded. Might be time to start looking for a new place to stay. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch05Sites_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: I think we've got bigger problems than overcrowding now. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch06Pastor_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: I think everybody's going to be sleeping with one eye open from now on. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_chX1Suicide_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: What the hell is Alan up to? - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_chX1Suicide_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Never would have expected that from Alan... maybe I was wrong about him. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_EdSuccumbed_Description
Constant.Value: While I was away, Ed succumbed to his injuries. As promised, Alan immediately put a bullet in his brain, so there was no risk of him turning. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_EdGotSicker_Description
Constant.Value: Ed's taking a turn for the worse. We aren't going to be able to treat him without Doc Hanson. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_HomeRelocation_Description
Constant.Value: We shouldn't just move anywhere. We need to find a suitable location if we're going to move. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_HomeRelocation_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Use the Radio to select a new home site.

Constant.Name: strEvent_PastorMassacre_Description
Constant.Value: Pastor Will succumbed to Black Fever and turned before we could react. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_AlanRecovered_Description
Constant.Value: Alan has healed up from his wounds. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_AlanReturned_Description
Constant.Value: Alan was MIA for a while, but he has returned. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_JacobRecovered_Description
Constant.Value: Jacob has healed up from his wounds. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_JacobReturned_Description
Constant.Value: Jacob was MIA for a while, but he has returned. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch03Meds_AbortSucceed_Summary
Constant.Value: Alan and Sam took care of it.

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch03Meds_AbortSucceed_Description
Constant.Value: No surprise. That loser Lily invited couldn't hang with the big boys. Sam and I took care of business, though. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch03Meds_AbortSucceed_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Win or lose, time keeps moving forward.

Constant.Name: strEvent_ch03Meds_Aborted_Description
Constant.Value: Met up with Sam and Alan, but things didn't go all that well. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi00Siege_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Doc Hanson's with the Wilkersons. From everything I've heard, these people are dangerous. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi00Siege_Completed_Summary
Constant.Value: Doc will meet you at home later.

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi00Siege_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Mickey and Job are in mourning for their brother Eli. Best to give them some space. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi00Siege_DocLeaves_Description
Constant.Value: I have other patients to see, but I will come visit the church and check on this friend of yours soon as I can. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi01Denial_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Somebody's been attacking survivors, stealing their stuff, and generally being assholes. Time to talk to the Wilkersons. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi01Denial_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Job says he doesn't know anything about raids. Yeah, right. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi02Cargo_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Mickey Wilkerson's got a "job" for interested takers. I'm not sure I want to know. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi02Cargo_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: So, Mickey beats the shit out of a guy, then has him escorted home? Weird. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wiX1Samaritan_Discovered_Summary
Constant.Value: Find out what spooked the poor guy.

Constant.Name: strEvent_wiX1Samaritan_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Note to self: deals with Job Wilkerson are bad news. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wiX1Samaritan_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Nobody deserves to be in debt to the Wilkersons. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi03Pitch_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: One of the Wilkersons' gun thugs is waiting to talk to me. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi03Exchange_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Mickey and Job have some kind of deal going down, and they want me as a neutral observer. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi03Exchange_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Business as usual for the Wilkersons. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi03Exchange_Stall_Description
Constant.Value: Mickey wanted me to reach out; let you know we appreciate having you as a neighbor. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_wi03Exchange_Stall_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Give it another day. They'll want something from us. - Lily

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd01Curfew_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sounds like there's some vestige of civilization hanging on at the courthouse in Marshall. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd01Purge_Discovered_Summary
Constant.Value: Clear the infestations with Sheriff Carl.

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd01Purge_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: The Sheriff wants some help clearing infestations. Guess I've been deputized. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd01Purge_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Cleared some infestations but Marshall's Police are barely hanging on. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd02Vision_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: I was contacted by a local bigshot, he wants to meet in Marshall. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd02Vision_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Ray shared his philosophy with me. Seems like a decent enough guy. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd02Drive_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Ray says he's got something for me. Wonder what it is. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pdR1Business_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: We've been asked to help Ray out with some deliveries. He says he'll make it worth our while. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pdR1Business_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Signed, sealed, and delivered. Now we'll see if Ray comes through with payment. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pdR1Business_Payoff_Description
Constant.Value: Payment received from Ray, as promised. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd03Destruction_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Something doesn't feel right about this one.... - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd03Destruction_Completed_Summary
Constant.Value: The Judge and the Sheriff are dead.

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd03Destruction_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Jesus, what a waste. Marshall may be lost. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd03Destruction_Aborted_Description
Constant.Value: Without our help, there's no way anyone survived. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd03Destruction_Timeout_Description
Constant.Value: Without our help, there's no way anyone survived. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd03Destruction_Stall_Description
Constant.Value: Business as usual at the Courthouse. Still confiscating guns and pretending they've got things under control. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_pd03Destruction_Stall_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Things are stable in Marshall... for today, at least.

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr01Rescue_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sounds like somebody lost one of their people. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr01Rescue_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Met some folks holed up in the grange outside Marshall. Decent folks, just hanging on. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strStoryGR_UnlockFortifications_Description
Constant.Value: We've had a few suspicious sightings. Might be people afraid to ask for help. Might be something to worry about. How are things over there? - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr02Fortifications_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sounds like the folks at the grange could use some help with their defenses. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr02Fortifications_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: That should last Becca a while. Also: TMI. Seriously. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr02Fortifications_Unimpressive_Description
Constant.Value: Apparently, I didn't pull my weight. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr03Question_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Quentin wants me to find out about Becca's past. Sheriff Parsons seemed to know something; maybe I should start with him. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr03Background_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Best place to start is probably the Courthouse. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr03Background_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Huh. No wonder Becca wanted to keep her past hidden. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr03Answer_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Guess I've got to decide what to tell Quentin. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr03Answer_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Well, we'll see how Qentin deals with it now.... - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr04Fury_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Well, I guess I better go find him. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr04Fury_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Jesus... like we don't have enough trouble with the walking dead? - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr04Fury_Stall_Name
Constant.Value: NOTE: I Still Can't Believe It

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr04Fury_Stall_Description
Constant.Value: It's all so wrong. I don't know if it's the lying or the whoring that bothers me more. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_gr04Fury_Stall_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Quentin may hold it together for today, but I'm not so sure about tomorrow. - Lily

Constant.Name: strEvent_bagSam_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Never would have figured Sam had such a soft side. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_bagSam_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: That's pretty much how I expected this to end. Still sucks. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_bagDoc_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Better go help Doc Hanson, we can't afford to lose his expertise. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_bagDiscord_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s has been on edge lately. Better do something about that before it gets out of hand -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_bagDiscord_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s seems to have calmed down a lot. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_bagFear_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s has been jumping at shadows lately. We need to do something about that. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_bagFear_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s seems to have gotten it together. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_bagDespair_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s has been really depressed lately. Better do something about that. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_bagDespair_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s seems to have cheered up a lot. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encJoinEscort_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: A group of survivors is interested in joining our community. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encJoinEscort_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Some new survivors have thrown their lot in with us. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encJoinEscort_First_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: We're not the only ones who made it! Some other survivors want to join us. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encJoinEscort_First_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: More hands are always a good thing. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encJoinEscort_MeetLaterSetup_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Our friends are willing to join us, but they need someone to escort them safely home. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encJoinEscort_MeetLater_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Those folks need someone to help them get down here. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encSupplies_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sounds like someone's been scavenging around here. We should look into it. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encSupplies_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Helped some folks with a supply run. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encSiege_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: The radio calls sound pretty urgent. I don't think there's any way they're getting out of there without help. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encSiege_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Hope we don't see another attack like that any time soon. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encSupplies_Wiped_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s is coming to stay with us now. Goddamn zombies. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encInfestation_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Other survivors are having problems with zombie infestations. We should consider helping them out. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encInfestation_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: That should thin the zombies out for a while. Makes things safer for all of us. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encInfestation_MissingFriend_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: %2$s is stuck in the middle of an infestation. Without help, I don't like the odds. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encInfestation_MissingFriend_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: We got %3$s out of there. Could have gone a lot worse. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTrouble_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Not sure what's going on here. Might be an indicator of survivor activity. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTradeAmmoForFood_Discovered_Summary
Constant.Value: 1 Case of Ammunition for 5 Daily Rations of Food.

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTradeAmmoForFood_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: We've gotten word that another group of survivors wants to trade some of their Food for some of our Ammunition. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTradeAmmoForMaterials_Discovered_Summary
Constant.Value: 1 Case of Ammunition for 10 Pallets of Building Materials.

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTradeAmmoForMaterials_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: We've gotten word that another group of survivors wants to trade some of their Building Materials for some of our Ammunition. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTradeAmmoForMedicine_Discovered_Summary
Constant.Value: 1 Case of Ammunition for 5 Cases of Medicine.

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTradeAmmoForMedicine_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: We've gotten word that another group of survivors wants to trade some of their Medicine for some of our Ammunition. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTradeAmmoForFuel_Discovered_Summary
Constant.Value: 1 Case of Ammunition for 5 Barrels of Fuel.

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTradeAmmoForFuel_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: We've gotten word that another group of survivors wants to trade some of their Fuel for some of our Ammunition. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTradeFoodForAmmo_Discovered_Summary
Constant.Value: 10 Daily Rations of Food for 2 Cases of Ammunition.

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTradeFoodForAmmo_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: We've gotten word that another group of survivors wants to trade some of their Ammunition for some of our Food. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encRescue_Favor_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Helped %3$s find one of their missing people. Got a nice little bonus out of it, too. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encSupplies_Favor_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Helped %3$s with a supply run. They were glad for the help, so they cut us in. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encInfestation_Favor_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Helped %3$s clear out an infestation. In return, they hooked us up with a little something from their stocks. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encSlaySwat_Favor_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Helped %3$s take out an Armored zombie. They said thanks with some supply stockpiles. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encSlayFeral_Favor_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Helped %3$s take out a Feral zombie. Thanked us with some supplies. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encTrainCombat_Favor_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Showed %3$s and their people some survival tips. They were happy to trade some supplies for the information. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encSave_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sounds like %3$s is in danger. Maybe we should help. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_encSave_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Thank you, %1$s. You were a real life-saver back there. - %3$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_TrustGain_Join_Description
Constant.Value: We appreciate everything you've done for us. - Your neighbor, %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_TrustChange_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Your actions determine other groups' attitudes toward you.

Constant.Name: strEnc_TrustGain_Friendly_Description
Constant.Value: I'm feeling pretty good about having you guys around. - Your neighbor, %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_TrustGain_Neutral_Description
Constant.Value: Seems like we can help each out, now and again. - Your neighbor, %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_TrustLoss_Neutral_Description
Constant.Value: I'm not entirely sure you people can be trusted. - Your watchful neighbor, %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_TrustLoss_Unfriendly_Description
Constant.Value: We were foolish to ever think you could be trusted. - Your reluctant neighbor, %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_Discovered_Friendly_Description
Constant.Value: I encountered a new group of survivors. So far they seem friendly. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_Discovered_Unfriendly_Description
Constant.Value: I encountered a new group of survivors. They're pretty guarded. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_Discovered_Confident_Description
Constant.Value: I encountered a new group of survivors. They seem pretty sure of themselves. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_Discovered_Join_Description
Constant.Value: I encountered a new group of survivors. I think they'll join us if we ask. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_Discovered_Endangered_Description
Constant.Value: I encountered a new group of survivors. They're barely hanging on. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_Discovered_Scared_Description
Constant.Value: I encountered a new group of survivors. They're worried. Aren't we all, though? - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_Discovered_Police_Description
Constant.Value: There's a lot of firepower here, but it looks like they're barely holding on. Same as the rest of us. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_Discovered_Hicks_Description
Constant.Value: The Wilkersons seem like a dangerous and volatile bunch. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_Discovered_Grocery_Description
Constant.Value: The survivors at the Grange seem like an interesting group. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEnc_Resource_Food_EffectDesc
Constant.Value: Good supply of FOOD in their location.

Constant.Name: strEnc_Resource_Medicine_EffectDesc
Constant.Value: Good supply of MEDICINE in their location.

Constant.Name: strEnc_Resource_Ammo_EffectDesc
Constant.Value: Good supply of AMMO in their location.

Constant.Name: strEnc_Resource_Materials_EffectDesc
Constant.Value: Good supply of MATERIALS in their location.

Constant.Name: strEnc_Resource_Fuel_EffectDesc
Constant.Value: Good supply of FUEL in their location.

Constant.Name: strEvent_comRecover_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: We're getting reports that %3$s is way overdue. Might want to look into it. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_comRecover_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: I managed to find %3$s and get them home safe and sound.

Constant.Name: strEvent_comRecover_SuicideTwist_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: I found %3$s, but it was too late. I did what I had to. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_comMercyShot_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: It's an ugly choice, but we have to consider the risks to the entire community. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_comMercyShot_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Goddamn I'm tired of having to make the hard choice. We won't forget you. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_comTrainCombat_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Some of our people could use some pointers on how to kick zed butt. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_comTrainCombat_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s is better prepared for close combat now, I hope it's enough. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_comSupplies_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s can probably handle it solo, but I could provide an escort if I wanted. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_comSupplies_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Helped %3$s on a supply run. Provided a safe escort home. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_comSupplyRescue_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s is in danger. I should go help before it's too late. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_comSupplyRescue_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s ran into some trouble on a supply run. I helped out. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awayInfestation_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s found an infestation and needs some help clearing it out. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awayInfestation_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: That's one less infestation we've got to worry about. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awayRescue_Wounded_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Nobody has any idea where %3$s is. If we don't find them soon, we might not find them at all. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awayRescue_Wounded_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s is a little banged up, but it's better than the alternative. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awaySave_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Sounds like %3$s is in a tight spot. Could use a hand getting home. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awaySave_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Hopefully next time %3$s will pay a little more attention to what's going on. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awayDiversion_Discovered_Summary
Constant.Value: Create a distraction to lure off the zeds.

Constant.Name: strEvent_awayDiversion_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: %3$s needs somebody to create a distraction for them. Got any noisemakers? -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awayDiversion_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Zombies fell for it hook, line, and sinker. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awaySurvey_Discovered_Summary
Constant.Value: Climb up and scout for danger.

Constant.Name: strEvent_awaySurvey_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: We need to get a better sense of what's going on around us. A quick survey would do us a lot of good. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awaySurvey_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: That should give us a better sense of where we stand. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awaySlaySwatZombie_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: We've got sightings of one of those zombies with body armor. Better take it out quick. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awaySlayArmyZombie_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Someone spotted an army zombie with body armor. We need to take it out. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awaySlayFeral_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: One of those creepy, fast bastards was spotted. We need to end this fucker now! -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awaySlayJuggernaut_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: One of the Miller boys was spotted, load up for bear. They can do some serious damage. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awaySlayBloater_Discovered_Description
Constant.Value: Report came in on one of those bloated gasbags, we need to kill this one quick. Keep your distance. -%2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_awaySlay_Completed_Description
Constant.Value: Just doing our part to keep the streets safe. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_Unlock_BuildIdealist_Description
Constant.Value: Quentin says I can RADIO him for advice that'll speed up construction projects. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_Unlock_SniperHothead_Description
Constant.Value: I should RADIO Mickey if I need some covering fire. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ExcessInfluence_Desc
Constant.Value: Your DAILY INFLUENCE is limited by your FAME. You can temporarily earn more Influence, but it will gradually diminish if it exceeds your Fame.

Constant.Name: strEvent_ExcessFood_Desc
Constant.Value: We have more FOOD than we'll be able to store. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ExcessStockpile_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Excess resources won't last through the night.

Constant.Name: strEvent_ExcessStockpile_FacilityDesc
Constant.Value: Build a STORAGE AREA to increase your STOCKPILE MAXIMUMS.

Constant.Name: strEvent_ExcessMedicine_Desc
Constant.Value: We have more MEDICINE than we'll be able to store. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ExcessAmmo_Desc
Constant.Value: We have more AMMO than we'll be able to store. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ExcessMaterials_Desc
Constant.Value: We have more MATERIALS than we'll be able to store. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ExcessFuel_Desc
Constant.Value: We have more FUEL than we'll be able to store. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strAttractGR_Coffee_Desc
Constant.Value: Hey Lily, we just got that fancy coffee maker/espresso machine at the grange up and running. You and your friends are invited to stop by for a cup any time. - Quentin Barnes

Constant.Name: strAttractWI_ThugGuns_Desc
Constant.Value: We looked into this thug problem that's been going around and took care of business. Come share in our windfall. - Job Wilkerson

Constant.Name: strAttractWI_ThugGuns_Summary
Constant.Value: New guns in the Farmhouse supply locker.

Constant.Name: strAttractWI_MilitaryGuns_Desc
Constant.Value: Just acquired a stash of military style weapons and I feel like sharing. Benefits of being on my good side. - Mickey Wilkerson

Constant.Name: strAttractWI_MilitaryGuns_Summary
Constant.Value: New guns in the Farmhouse supply locker.

Constant.Name: strAttractWI_MachineGun_Desc
Constant.Value: We got something really special you should check out. (It's a goddamn M60E4!) - Mickey Wilkerson

Constant.Name: strAttractWI_MachineGun_Summary
Constant.Value: One new gun in the Farmhouse supply locker.

Constant.Name: strAttractPD_Items_Desc
Constant.Value: I have a friend in the courthouse says they've got a little hardware to spare. Just head to the back room and check it out. - your friend Ray

Constant.Name: strAttractPD_Items_Summary
Constant.Value: New items at the Courthouse supply locker.

Constant.Name: strEnemy_ArmyZombie_Description
Constant.Value: Fast, deadly, and nearly immune to gunfire.

Constant.Name: strEnemy_Bloater_Description
Constant.Value: Not all that hard to kill, but they're highly infectious.

Constant.Name: strEnemy_Feral_Description
Constant.Value: Fast, vicious, tough in melee, and hard to shoot.

Constant.Name: strEnemy_Juggernaut_Description
Constant.Value: Extremely tough. Can be stunned with explosives.

Constant.Name: strEnemy_Infestation_Description
Constant.Value: Makes the surrounding area a lot more dangerous.

Constant.Name: strItem_Grenade_PipeBomb_Desc
Constant.Value: It's a bunch of explosives stuffed into a pipe. What could go wrong?

Constant.Name: strItem_Grenade_PipeBomb_Strong_Desc
Constant.Value: It's a WHOLE bunch of explosives stuffed into a pipe. Extra shrapnel means more dead zombies.

Constant.Name: strItem_Mine_Homemade_Fire_Desc
Constant.Value: Like a Molotov, but this one's pressure sensitive.

Constant.Name: strItem_Mine_Homemade_Lure_Desc
Constant.Value: Cram a noisemaker into a homemade mine, and it lures the zombies in before it explodes. Nice.

Constant.Name: strItem_Mine_Homemade_Desc
Constant.Value: So what if it's a bunch of nuts and bolts in an old paint can? It still explodes.

Constant.Name: strItem_Noisemaker_Firecracker_Desc
Constant.Value: Sudden noises are great for grabbing attention. (Best to toss these and then run or hide.)

Constant.Name: strItem_Stimulant_Homemade_Desc
Constant.Value: Restores max Stamina a little. Fresh from our med lab. Heisenberg would be proud.

Constant.Name: strItem_Stimulant_Homemade_Long_Desc
Constant.Value: Restores max Stamina a lot. Fresh from our lab, cooked up extra potent. (Addictive?)

Constant.Name: strItem_Suppressor_Homemade_Desc
Constant.Value: Cuts down gunshot noise. Made this one out of an oil can, figure it's only good for 10 shots or so.

Constant.Name: strItem_Suppressor_Homemade_Durable_Desc
Constant.Value: Cuts down gunshot noise. Decent construction; this one should last 30 shots, give or take.

Constant.Name: strItem_Suppressor_Homemade_Quiet_Desc
Constant.Value: Cuts down gunshot noise. Not quite professional quality, but might last for a good 50 shots.

Constant.Name: strItem_Molotov_Alcohol_Desc
Constant.Value: Sets zeds on fire. This one's just a rag stuffed into a bottle of booze. Top shelf too.

Constant.Name: strItem_Molotov_Fuel_Desc
Constant.Value: Sets zeds on fire. They don't seem to like it much. This one's made with gasoline.

Constant.Name: strItem_Molotov_Hicks_Desc
Constant.Value: Light em' up! Redneck's special blend. Pretty sure it's pure wood-grain alcohol.

Constant.Name: strItem_Molotov_Homemade_Desc
Constant.Value: Zeds dislike fire. This one comes fresh out of our workshop, so go us!

Constant.Name: strItem_Molotov_Thermite_Desc
Constant.Value: The AN-M14 TH3 chemical incendiary. Pretty sure this one could melt through a truck engine.

Constant.Name: strItem_Molotov_Homemade_Strong_Desc
Constant.Value: Sets zeds on fire. They don't seem to like it much. Watch it with this one--it's got a kick.

Constant.Name: strItem_Grenade_Desc
Constant.Value: Pull pin, toss, wait for boom. Repeat as necessary.

Constant.Name: strItem_Grenade_Homemade_Desc
Constant.Value: You throw it. It goes boom. If you're lucky, not right in your face.

Constant.Name: strItem_Grenade_M67_Desc
Constant.Value: Standard military hand grenade. This one fell off a truck, a big green truck.

Constant.Name: strItem_Grenade_Mk2_Desc
Constant.Value: The old pineapple grenade, I'm sure it's still ok after sitting around for 65 years.

Constant.Name: strItem_Mine_M14_Desc
Constant.Value: Stockpiled since 1974, this example came out of an EOD training container.

Constant.Name: strItem_Mine_BouncingBetty_Desc
Constant.Value: Pops up to head height for optimal zombie killing.

Constant.Name: Painkiller_Homemade_Desc
Constant.Value: Good stuff. Numbs the pain, but won't help serious wounds.

Constant.Name: strEvent_NewDay_Desc
Constant.Value: Every day is a gift, one more than a lot of good people had. I try to remind myself of that. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_DeathFromBlackFever_Desc
Constant.Value: There's something unnatural about this so-called Black Fever. No medicines seem to help. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_DeathFromFreak_Desc
Constant.Value: When we have freak sightings, we need to be more proactive about dealing with them. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_DeathFromInfestation_Desc
Constant.Value: We've let the zeds overrun too much of valley. It's not safe. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_DeathFromSickness_Desc
Constant.Value: It's always hard to lose someone. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_DeathFromChemistry_Desc
Constant.Value: We let things get toxic in the community and now we've paid the price. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_RecoveryFromInjury_Desc
Constant.Value: It's nice to see medical treatment work out. Everyone's breathing a sigh of relief. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_RecoveryFromInjury_Fail_Desc
Constant.Value: %2$s has failed to recover from injury.

Constant.Name: strEvent_RecoveryFromSickness_Desc
Constant.Value: It's nice to see medical treatment work out. Everyone's breathing a sigh of relief. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_RecoveryFromSickness_Fail_Desc
Constant.Value: %2$s has failed to recover from illness.

Constant.Name: strEvent_RecoveryFrom_NoMedicine_Tutorial
Constant.Value: MEDICINE is needed for a chance at recovery.

Constant.Name: strEvent_RecoveryFrom_NoInfirmary_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Building an INFIRMARY will increase our chances of recovery in the future.

Constant.Name: strEvent_RecoveryFrom_InfirmaryUpgrade_Tutorial
Constant.Value: UPGRADING our INFIRMARY will increase our chances of recovery in the future.

Constant.Name: strEvent_RecoveryFrom_MaxChance_Tutorial
Constant.Value: We have the highest possible recovery chance.

Constant.Name: strEvent_AbandonmentBadReputation_Desc
Constant.Value: Well, I guess we can stop worrying about philosophical differences about how to run the community. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_AbandonmentChemistry_Desc
Constant.Value: We let things get toxic in the community and now we've paid the price. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ResistedFlu_Desc
Constant.Value: It's nice to see medical treatment work out. Everyone's breathing a sigh of relief. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ResistedFreak_Desc
Constant.Value: Our defenses managed to hold. Things could have been a lot worse. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_SleepDeprivation_Desc
Constant.Value: We need to do something about our lack of beds. People aren't getting enough rest. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_WeakFromHunger_Desc
Constant.Value: When we don't have enough food for everyone, people go hungry. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strAbortEvent_HomeCoreNpcDeath_Desc
Constant.Value: I was out with %2$s when things turned south. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strDangerSetup_SwatZombie_Desc
Constant.Value: It's best to tackle these in hand-to-hand combat. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strDangerSetup_ArmyZombie_Desc
Constant.Value: It's best to tackle these in hand-to-hand combat. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strDangerSetup_Juggernaut_Desc
Constant.Value: We'd best bring some explosives along. -%1$s

Constant.Name: strDangerSetup_Bloater_Desc
Constant.Value: I spotted a bloated zed not too far from home. Might want to take it out before it finds us. Never want to let these get too close. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_EstablishOutpost_Desc
Constant.Value: After fully searching a building, I can radio home and have the guys set up an outpost.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_EstablishOutpost_Summary
Constant.Value: Look for "Establish Outpost" in the Radio.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_EstablishOutpost_Tutorial
Constant.Value: The more outposts you have, the safer your home is.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_CallRunners_Desc
Constant.Value: After scouting a building, you can use the radio to call in other community members to loot the place.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_CallRunners_Summary
Constant.Value: Look for "Call for Scavengers" in the Radio.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_CallRunners_Tutorial
Constant.Value: The scavenger will decide for himself what to take.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_SWAT_Desc
Constant.Value: If you get into a jam, I can call in SWAT officers from the Courthouse to help out. - Sheriff Carl

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_SWAT_Summary
Constant.Value: Extra firepower when you need it.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_SWAT_Tutorial
Constant.Value: They'll come help for a few minutes.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_Airstrike_Summary
Constant.Value: A military solution to your problems.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_Airstrike_Tutorial
Constant.Value: You'll need inventory space for the ARTILLERY MARKER.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_Heal_Desc
Constant.Value: I owe you one. Let me know if you or your people need any Medical Advice. - Doc Hanson

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_Heal_Summary
Constant.Value: Restore Max Vitality in the field.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_Heal_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Rest is the only other way to restore Max Vitality.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_Energy_Pastor_Desc
Constant.Value: Reach out to Pastor Will for some moral support.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_Energy_Pastor_Summary
Constant.Value: Restore Max Stamina once a day.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_Energy_Pastor_Tutorial
Constant.Value: You can also switch off and rest at home to recover stamina.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_Energy_Lily_Desc
Constant.Value: Reach out to Lily for some moral support.

Constant.Name: strRadioUnlock_Energy_Lily_Summary
Constant.Value: Restore Max Stamina once a day.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Survey_Description
Constant.Value: Rather than charging in blindly, Lily suggests using elevated survey locations to spot areas of heavy zombie activity and scope out places that are likely to have useful stuff. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Survey_Summary
Constant.Value: We can scope things out in advance.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Survey_Tutorial
Constant.Value: I'll mark survey locations on my map with BINOCULARS.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_MissionTimeout_Description
Constant.Value: Most missions are only available for a limited time. The more urgent the situation, the sooner the mission opportunity will pass.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_MissionTimeout_Effect_Success
Constant.Value: Even without your help, a mission may end in success.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_MissionTimeout_Effect_Failure
Constant.Value: But the more dangerous the situation, the more likely it will result in injury or death.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Fatigue_Description
Constant.Value: We can't stay at the church forever, but if we're going to move somewhere it needs a good defensible perimeter.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Fatigue_Summary
Constant.Value: Look for "Relocate Home" in the Radio.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Attitude_Description
Constant.Value: Individual attitudes change frequently, affected by pride, gratitude, hope, fear, sorrow, and anger.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Attitude_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Lily will warn you if someone's attitude is cause for concern.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_TrustGain_Description
Constant.Value: Completing missions helps, but you can also gain TRUST with individual actions like cheering someone on after a kill.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_TrustLoss_Description
Constant.Value: Reckless actions, like setting an ally on fire, affect TRUST and ATTITUDE of those around you.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_HungerRecovery_Description
Constant.Value: Glad we got some real food. It was getting hard to stay alert. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_HungerRecovery_Tutorial
Constant.Value: SNACKS aren't enough to combat long-standing HUNGER.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_InjuryRecovery_Description
Constant.Value: Community members who are Hurt have a chance to recover (or get worse) every day.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_InjuryRecovery_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Anyone who is GRAVELY WOUNDED is in danger of dying instead of recovering.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Recovery_Effect_Medicine
Constant.Value: Having a good Medicine Stockpile improves Recovery Chance.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Recovery_Effect_Facility
Constant.Value: The better our medical facilities, the higher the Recovery Chance.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Recovery_Effect_Staff
Constant.Value: Having a community member with a medical background improves Recovery Chance.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_IllnessRecovery_Description
Constant.Value: Community members who are Sick have a chance to recover (or get worse) every day.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_IllnessRecovery_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Anyone who is GRAVELY ILL is in danger of dying instead of recovering.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Painkillers_Description
Constant.Value: Vitality drops whenever you get hurt. Taking serious damage lowers your Maximum Vitality.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Painkillers_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Attacks from Freak zombies or while you are on the ground reduce your Maximum Vitality.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Infestation_Description
Constant.Value: Once zeds overrun a building, they'll continue to occupy it unless we clear them out.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Infestation_Effect_Danger
Constant.Value: The more Infestations out there, the more dangerous things are.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Infestation_Effect_Molotov
Constant.Value: Area of effect items like petrol bombs are good when taking on groups.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Juggernaut_Description
Constant.Value: In life, the Miller cousins were big and ornery . In death, they're much the same.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Juggernaut_Effect_Tough
Constant.Value: Headshots still work, but it may take more than one.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Juggernaut_Effect_Cars
Constant.Value: Don't count on a car surviving an encounter with one of these guys.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Juggernaut_Effect_Explosives
Constant.Value: Our best bet is immobilizing them with explosives.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Feral_Description
Constant.Value: Nearly all zeds behave in a primal, aggressive way, but FERAL ZEDS take it to another level.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Feral_Effect_Elusive
Constant.Value: The combination of speed and erratic movement can make them hard to shoot.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Feral_Effect_Fire
Constant.Value: Incendiaries and explosives may be your best bet.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Bloater_Description
Constant.Value: Drowning victims seem to come back as these toxic, BLOATED ZEDS.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Bloater_Effect_Gas
Constant.Value: Don't stand too close to one after taking it out. That gas is toxic.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Bloater_Effect_Car
Constant.Value: Running one over might not be the best idea either.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Screamer_Description
Constant.Value: Not much of a direct threat, but if you let a SCREAMER keep making noise, it'll bring a lot of zeds to the area.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Screamer_Effect_Infestation
Constant.Value: At least one screamer can be found in any Infestation.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Noise_Description
Constant.Value: If you're careless about making noise, it's easy to attract a lot of zeds and get overwhelmed.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Noise_Effect_Combat
Constant.Value: Any combat sounds draw attention, but gunfire is extremely loud. Use caution when firing a gun without a suppressor.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Noise_Effect_Car
Constant.Value: Cars make a lot of noise. When driving, consider parking AWAY from your destination so you don't draw zeds to you.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Noise_Effect_Searching
Constant.Value: When you search rapidly, you risk breaking something and making a lot of noise.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Noise_Effect_Distractions
Constant.Value: Loud noises can be used to temporarily draw zeds away from you.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Scouting_Description
Constant.Value: Safe only goes so far. Hordes can still wander through and noise can always draw zeds in.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Scouting_Effect_Clear
Constant.Value: Fully exploring a building creates a temporary safe area.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Scouting_Effect_Home
Constant.Value: Expand the safe area around your home using a Watchtower.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Scouting_Effect_Outpost
Constant.Value: Each Outpost creates a safe area around it.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_PersonalSkill_Description
Constant.Value: Some days you wish people knew more survival techniques and less sports trivia.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Hordes_Description
Constant.Value: Zombie Hordes move and become alerted as a group. Don't fight them if you don't have to.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Hordes_Effect_Noise
Constant.Value: Avoid the VISION CONE and don't make NOISE near a HORDE to prevent detection.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_LoadRucksack_Description
Constant.Value: You can load up a Rucksack and carry it home to increase your community's stockpiles of Food, Medicine, Ammo, Materials, or Fuel.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_LoadRucksack_Summary
Constant.Value: A way to bring resources home.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_LoadRucksack_Encumbrance
Constant.Value: While carrying a Rucksack, you'll be Encumbered, wearing down your Max Stamina faster than normal.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_LoadRucksack_BreakOpen
Constant.Value: You can also Break Open resources for immediate usage, but this destroys

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_LoadRucksack_Tutorial
Constant.Value: You can radio home for SCAVENGERS instead and let someone else do the heavy lifting.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Friendship_Description
Constant.Value: Once you've earned 100% Trust with someone, you can talk to them about becoming Friends.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Friendship_Tutorial
Constant.Value: You can switch to any of your FRIENDS.

Constant.Name: strSurvivalTip_Personality_Description
Constant.Value: Everyone's got their strengths and weaknesses, but some people are a lot more trouble than others.

Constant.Name: strActivity_InterceptHorde_Outpost_Desc
Constant.Value: Our outpost took out an incoming horde. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventBadRepCrisis_Resist_GoodAct_Summary
Constant.Value: Selfless actions are helping keep the peace.

Constant.Name: strEventBadRepCrisis_Resist_GoodAct_Desc
Constant.Value: We did a few good things today. I'll grant you that. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventHordeCount_Remind_Desc
Constant.Value: With so many hordes out there, our people are in constant danger. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventInfestationCount_Remind_Desc
Constant.Value: Trying to find a safe spot to hide is a lot harder with so many infestations. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventArmyZombie_Remind_Desc
Constant.Value: It takes some real hand-to-hand combat skill to take these on. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventArmyZombie_Remind_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Maybe COMBAT TRAINING at a DOJO would help.

Constant.Name: strEventSwatZombie_Remind_Desc
Constant.Value: Those SWAT zombies can wear you out and you gotta fight 'em hand-to-hand. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventSwatZombie_Remind_Tutorial
Constant.Value: We should consider a FITNESS REGIMEN at an TRAINING AREA.

Constant.Name: strEventBloater_Remind_Tutorial
Constant.Value: OUTPOSTS could take him out before he reaches us.

Constant.Name: strEventFeral_Remind_Summary
Constant.Value: We need ammo to deal with it.

Constant.Name: strEventFeral_Remind_Desc
Constant.Value: We'd better do something. I've seen them leap walls like they were nothing. - %1$s.

Constant.Name: strEventFeral_Remind_Tutorial
Constant.Value: We need to make sure we're well fortified.

Constant.Name: strEventFeral_Remind_Tower_Desc
Constant.Value: We'd better do something. I've seen them leap walls like they were nothing. - %1$s.

Constant.Name: strEventJuggernaut_Remind_Desc
Constant.Value: That guy was just as tough as you'd fear... and faster than you'd expect. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventJuggernaut_Remind_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Having a workshop to make explosives is our best bet against him.

Constant.Name: strEventJuggernaut_Resist_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Using explosives made in the workshop was key.

Constant.Name: strEventJuggernaut_Resist_Desc
Constant.Value: Spotted a Juggernaut on its way toward us. We were able to use explosives to take it out. - %1$s.

Constant.Name: strEventGraveHurt_Remind_Desc
Constant.Value: %1$s has been feverish and delirious for much of the day. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strEventGraveSick_Remind_Desc
Constant.Value: I'm too tired to try to hide it. I vomited blood today. I don't know if I'm going to make it. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventDespair_Resist_Summary
Constant.Value: %1$s was in a bad place, but %2$s managed to talk them out of doing anything stupid.

Constant.Name: strEventDiscord_Setup_Desc
Constant.Value: I'll tell you assholes what: You are lucky as hell I'm here. If there was a medal for zombie fighting master, it'd be a gold engraving of my face with a double-fucking rainbow behind it. -%1$s.

Constant.Name: strEventFear_Setup_Desc
Constant.Value: I came face to face with a screamer today and nearly shit myself. -%1$s.

Constant.Name: strEventFear_Resist_Desc
Constant.Value: %1$s was going to abandon us, but luckily %2$s has a sixth sense about these kinds of things.

Constant.Name: strEventNoFuel_Remind_Desc
Constant.Value: We can't run generators without any fuel. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventDiseaseOutbreak_Setup_Desc
Constant.Value: Seems like there's a bug going around. It's only a matter of time before it hits us. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventDiseaseOutbreak_Payoff_Desc
Constant.Value: %1$s has the flu. We knew it was going around, but didn't prepare. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strEventDiseaseOutbreak_Resist_Desc
Constant.Value: We've had a couple of people showing flu-like symptoms. We're churning through meds trying to keep everyone well. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventEncRecruitMissing_Desc
Constant.Value: Thought you'd want to know I made it. I met up with some good people. I have a new home now. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventEncRecruitMissing_Expelled_Desc
Constant.Value: Thought you were hot shit kicking me out, right? Well, it turns out I don't need you assholes. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventEncRecruitMissing_Loyal_Desc
Constant.Value: Thought you'd want to know I made it. I met up with some good people. I have a new home now. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventOutpostRescue_Desc
Constant.Value: %1$s found shelter at one of our outposts. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strEventOutpostRescue_None_Desc
Constant.Value: Still no luck finding %1$s. This would be easier if we had some outposts. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strEventNoInfirmary_Payoff_Desc
Constant.Value: %2$s got me sick. We need an infirmary and sick people need to stay in it. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventNoInfirmary_Resist_Desc
Constant.Value: We're burning through meds at an alarming rate. I think everyone's a little paranoid about getting sick. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEventFate_Effect_Grave_Description
Constant.Value: May be a danger to the community.

Constant.Name: strEventFate_Effect_Victim_Description
Constant.Value: Took the brunt of the abuse.

Constant.Name: strEventFate_Effect_Malcontent_Description
Constant.Value: Not happy about how things are going.

Constant.Name: strBoG_Generic_Complete_Desc
Constant.Value: %1$s will be remembered as a hero. Without this sacrifice we would not have triumphed. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strBoG_Generic_Abort_Desc
Constant.Value: Even in defeat, we can fight back. %1$s understood that. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strBoG_Infestation_Complete_Desc
Constant.Value: %1$s will be remembered as a hero. Without this sacrifice we would not have triumphed. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strBoG_Infestation_Abort_Desc
Constant.Value: Even in defeat, we can fight back. %1$s understood that. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strBoG_Rescue_Complete_Desc
Constant.Value: I will be forever grateful. Without %1$s's sacrifice, I would not be here today. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strBoG_Rescue_Abort_Desc
Constant.Value: Even in defeat, we can fight back. %1$s understood that. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strBoG_EncJoin_Complete_Desc
Constant.Value: I will be forever grateful. Without %1$s's sacrifice, I would not be here today. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strBoG_EncJoin_Abort_Desc
Constant.Value: Even in defeat, we can fight back. %1$s understood that. - %2$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ResetCommunity_Description
Constant.Value: The new group we brought in didn't last, but I'm glad we tried to help them. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strEvent_ResetCommunity_Summary
Constant.Value: Lily's trying to pick up the pieces.

Constant.Name: strWant_Build_Description
Constant.Value: It looks like we don't have everything we need to build this facility. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strWant_General_Description
Constant.Value: It looks like work's going to be stalled a bit. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strWant_Research_Description
Constant.Value: Our research project has run into some unexpected delays. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strWant_Upgrade_Description
Constant.Value: We're going to need a few things to complete this upgrade. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strChallengeComplete_HeadshotStreak_Description
Constant.Value: I had this crazy streak of headshots just now. I must be getting better at shooting. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strChallengeComplete_HeadshotStreak_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Skillful feats like a headshot streak provide a big XP boost.

Constant.Name: strChallengeComplete_MultiKill_Description
Constant.Value: Taking out multiple zeds with one shot... Now that takes some real skill. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strChallengeComplete_Multikill_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Skillful feats like a one-shot multikill provide a big XP boost.

Constant.Name: strChallengeComplete_Slaughter_EdgedLight_Description
Constant.Value: A zed's not much of a threat one-on-one, but taking a bunch out in close quarters takes skill. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strChallengeComplete_Slaughter_EdgedLight_Summary
Constant.Value: Bonus XP for Hack n Slash

Constant.Name: strChallengeComplete_Slaughter_EdgedLight_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Skillful feats like a Slaughter provide a big XP boost.

Constant.Name: strChallengeComplete_Slaughter_BluntHeavy_Description
Constant.Value: A zed's not much of a threat one-on-one, but taking a bunch out in close quarters takes skill. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strChallengeComplete_Slaughter_BluntHeavy_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Skillful feats like a Slaughter provide a big XP boost.

Constant.Name: strChallengeComplete_Slaughter_BluntLight_Description
Constant.Value: A zed's not much of a threat one-on-one, but taking a bunch out in close quarters takes skill. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strChallengeComplete_Slaughter_BluntLight_Tutorial
Constant.Value: Skillful feats like a Slaughter provide a big XP boost.

Constant.Name: strMoveHome_Church_Summary
Constant.Value: Welcome to the Church of the Ascension

Constant.Name: strMoveHome_Church_Description
Constant.Value: We've packed everyone up and moved back into the Church of the Ascension. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strMoveHome_Alamo_Description
Constant.Value: We've relocated to the Alamo BBQ and Burrito Hacienda. The food here wasn't very authentic, but the wall's surprisingly legit. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strMoveHome_Rodeo_Summary
Constant.Value: Welcome to the Trumbull County Fairgrounds

Constant.Name: strMoveHome_Rodeo_Description
Constant.Value: There's a reason the Army chose this location. Pretty sweet. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strMoveHome_Warehouse_Description
Constant.Value: We could really hold out here for a while; just need enough people to guard the walls. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strMoveHome_Riverside_Description
Constant.Value: Our new home, the Savini Residence, has a built-in watchtower with that treehouse. Jacob always did love this place. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strMoveHome_BigJohn_Description
Constant.Value: The Kirkman Residence is a bit bigger than the church, and has a built-in workshop. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strMoveHome_DanielFarm_Description
Constant.Value: This place is nice and isolated. That's a big plus except when we need to make a supply run. - %1$s

Constant.Name: strMoveHome_RangerStation_Description
Constant.Value: Coming up here can't be a good idea. There's no wall. - %1$s
